topic: A person correctly using a French Press to brew coffee, countertop view.

parsed_generation.script:
Shot 1 [00:00-00:02]: Person adds coffee grounds to the French press — front view
Shot 2 [00:02-00:05]: Person pours hot water into the French press — side-angle
Shot 3 [00:05-00:08]: Person presses the plunger to brew coffee — close-up
parsed_generation.narration: Across three shots, a person at the countertop adds grounds, pours hot water, and then presses the plunger to brew. The sequence uses front view, side-angle, and close-up to emphasize the coffee-making process.

feedback:
The prompt captures the basic French press workflow but diverges from the gold standard by omitting key stages (bloom, stirring, a multi-minute wait, and the final pour) and by not matching the exact timestamped four-shot structure. To align, adopt the precise [00:00-00:02], [00:02-00:04], [00:04-00:07], [00:07-00:08] sequence, include bloom/steam, stirring, a timed wait, and a pour, and present the shots with consistent timestamp formatting (no leading 'Shot' labels).
Failed checks: example_alignment
strengths: Clear front/side/close-up sequencing that keeps focus on a countertop French press workflow.
Concise, action-first wording that emphasizes each brewing action.
fixes: Adopt the exact timestamp structure and a four-shot progression matching the gold standard.
Add missing visuals: bloom/steam, wooden spoon stirring, a ~4-minute wait (potentially time-lapse), and a side-view pour into a cup; specify a glass carafe and a lid/plunger sequence.
